_comment: Personalization profiles customize Windows Explorer and UI settings
name: Developer personalization
description: Explorer + taskbar tweaks for development machines. Shows hidden files, file extensions, and reduces sync notifications.

actions._comment: Show hidden files and folders in Explorer

_comment._comment: Show file extensions for all files
_comment.name: HideFileExt

_comment._comment: Show full path in Explorer title bar
_comment.name: FullPath

_comment._comment: Disable taskbar search box (frees up taskbar space)
_comment.name: SearchboxTaskbarMode
